title: helichrysum mixtum var. mixtum
intro: Helichrysum mixtum var. mixtum, also known as the annual Helichrysum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum mixtum var. mixtum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
